task_completion.description: Verify that any login or sign-in dialogs have been dismissed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the EdrawMax application window. Ensure there are no 'Login', 'Sign In', or account registration pop-ups blocking the main workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify that the flowchart_en.eddx file is open in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the tabs or the title bar of the EdrawMax application to confirm that 'flowchart_en' is the currently active document.

task_completion.description: Verify that the theme selection menu or panel is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Design tab, Page Style panel, or Theme menu being open and actively displayed in the EdrawMax interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the color theme of the flowchart has been changed to 'Warm'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Warm' theme being highlighted or selected in the theme panel, OR observe that the flowchart shapes on the canvas have visibly changed to a warm color palette (e.g., reds, oranges, yellows).

task_completion.description: Verify that the save dialog is opened to save the updated file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' or file browser dialog window opened over the main EdrawMax interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the file is saved to the correct path with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Save As' dialog to see the directory set to '/home/ga' and the file name set to 'themed_flowchart.eddx', OR look at the application title bar/tab showing the new filename 'themed_flowchart' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the EdrawMax GUI to apply the theme and save the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of mouse clicks, cursor movements, and open menus within the EdrawMax application rather than terminal commands executing the changes.

integrity.description: Verify that the task was performed inside Wondershare EdrawMax.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the application UI, icons, and title bar to ensure it is genuinely Wondershare EdrawMax and not a text editor or a different drawing tool.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not bypass the UI by just copying and renaming the file in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing 'cp' or 'mv' commands used to create 'themed_flowchart.eddx' without applying the theme in the GUI.
